instructions: Fill this file with published or externally reproduced baseline numbers.
One entry per case_name. Keep metrics comparable to local results: l2_error, linf_error, elapsed_s.
Suggested sources: PDEBench pretrained models, PDEArena experiments, or literature-reported benchmark tables.

baselines.citation: Replace with paper or dataset URL
baselines.notes: Fill manually after reproducing or extracting from a paper table.
